main.description: Link that takes the user straight to the main content of the page.

form.description: Link that takes the user straight to the main content on the page when it is a form.

prereview.description: Link that takes the user straight to the PREreview on the page.

preprintDetails.description: Link that takes the user straight to details about a preprint, such as its title and abstract.

datasetDetails.description: Link that takes the user straight to details about a dataset, such as its title and abstract.

prereviews.description: Link that takes the user straight to a list of PREreviews for a preprint.
